summary: Russian forces are using the "Rubikon" drone center to conduct daily strikes in Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman, destroying over 100 Ukrainian targets in two days, including personnel and fixed-wing UAVs. Ukrainian border units struck Russian positions on the southern front, destroying an observation post, shelter, mortar position, and antenna equipment. Ukraine is rapidly expanding its drone fleet, contracting twice as many Mavic, Autel, and Matrice drones in January-February 2026 compared to last year, with a 17% increase in February deliveries. Russian "Elka" and "Yolka" air defense drones are performing kinetic intercepts on Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. Ukrainian FPV pilots are targeting Russian infantry, including a reported incident where a Russian soldier charged a drone with a bayonet and was killed. Ukrainian forces are also deploying "Molniya" strike and reconnaissance drones, which are challenging to counter due to unknown control frequencies.
